lmmix 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Guides
    • Estimation and inference in lmmix
    • Validation strategy and numerical benchmarks
  • Changelog

Package index

Fit and control

lmm()
Fit a Gaussian linear mixed model
lmm_control()
Control numerical optimization for lmm()

Inference and marginal means

lsmeans()
Estimated marginal means for an lmm model
summary(<lmm>)
Summarize an lmm fit

Model methods

print(<lmm>) coef(<lmm>) vcov(<lmm>) logLik(<lmm>) AIC(<lmm>) BIC(<lmm>) deviance(<lmm>) nobs(<lmm>) fitted(<lmm>) residuals(<lmm>) sigma(<lmm>) predict(<lmm>) model.matrix(<lmm>) model.frame(<lmm>) formula(<lmm>) terms(<lmm>) anova(<lmm>) confint(<lmm>)
Standard methods for lmm fits

Extractors

fixef()
Extract fixed effects
ranef()
Extract random effects
VarCorr()
Extract covariance components

Tidy methods

tidy(<lmm>)
Tidy an lmm model
glance(<lmm>)
One-row model summary for an lmm model
augment(<lmm>)
Augment data with fitted values and residuals

Interoperability

recover_data(<lmm>) emm_basis(<lmm>)
Support for emmeans

Data

multicentre
Multi-site repeated-measures experiment

On this page

Developed by Aurélien Nicosia.
